summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hospital Transfer Management System Phase 2. Backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (26/26 tests passed). All Phase 2 features fully functional including trip types (clinico/no_clinico), clinical fields, custom origin/destination, mileage dialogs, clickable dispatch stats, assignment with vehicle selection, and weekly calendar. Frontend UI integration excellent across all user roles.

ui_bugs.issue: Some dropdown options in trip forms may timeout on click in automation

passed_tests: Admin login (admin@hospital.cl / admin123) -> /admin dashboard
User registration and approval workflow for all roles (solicitante, conductor, jefe_turno)
Trip creation - clinico type with patient name, clinical team, contact person
Trip creation - no_clinico type with material description
Custom origin/destination with 'Otro (especificar)' option functionality
Scheduled date defaults to today (Phase 2 feature)
Trip edit functionality for pending trips (Phase 2 feature)
Trip detail dialog with comprehensive information display
Driver pool access and self-assignment to trips
Manager assignment with driver AND vehicle selection (Phase 2 feature)
Trip mileage workflow - start/complete with mileage recording (Phase 2 feature)
Clickable dispatch stats cards with navigation (Phase 2 feature)
Weekly calendar view with trip visualization (Phase 2 feature)
Calendar navigation - prev/next week, today button (Phase 2 feature)
Vehicle management with OCR mileage registration buttons
Driver availability toggle and vehicle status management
All role-based dashboard navigation and access control
Sidebar navigation working across all user roles
Authentication persistence and proper redirects
Trip status tracking and color coding in calendar
Assignment dialog with driver and vehicle dropdowns
Backend API integration - all 26 endpoints working
Vehicle mileage update and maintenance alerts
Destination management for trip origin/destination selection
Complete user lifecycle - register, approve, login, access dashboard
